basic_details.job_title: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Consultant, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Consultant, Project Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: Rajiv Gandhi University (RGU) Project Consultant, Project Associate and Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website of Rajiv Gandhi University. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the RGU Project Consultant, Project Associate and Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: 65 Years (Project Consultant), 35 Years (Project Associate), 35 Years (Project Assistant)
age_limit.details: Project Consultant: Upper age limit: 65 Years Project Associate: Upper age limit: 35 Years Project Assistant: Upper age limit: 35 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in Science/Engineering/Technology or equivalent, B.Tech./B.E. with experience, Graduate in Science/Engineering/Technology or relevant discipline
qualification.details: Project Consultant: Master Degree in Science / Engineering/ Technology or equivalent from a recognised university. Experience: Govt./Private Sector who have significant working experience in science/ technology development and handling of projects preferably AI-ML based projects/ Industry-academia relationship. Desirable: B.Tech. + MTech. /MBA & PhD in CSE/AI-ML/DS or equivalent along with NET/GATE from IIT, NIT /IIM or NIRF under 50 institutions with Patents and SCI Publications. Project Associate: Master Degree in Science/ Engineering/ Technology or equivalent from a recognised university. Or B.Tech./B.E. from a recognised university with significant working experience. Desirable: ME/ M.Tech.(CSE)/ MSc.(CS) / MCA or similar discipline with UGC-NET/ GATE Project Assistant: Graduate in Science/Engineering/ Technology or any relevant discipline from a recognised university. Desirable: ME/ M.Tech.(CSE)/ MSc.(CS) / MCA or similar discipline with UGC-NET/ GATE

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 2000/ per day up to Rs. 40000 + 10% HRA / per month max. (Project Consultant), Rs. 25000 + 10% HRA (Project Associate), Rs. 20000 + 10% HRA (Project Assistant)
salary_details.details: Project Consultant: Rs 2000/ per day up to Rs. 40000 + 10% HRA / per month max. Project Associate: Rs. 25000 + 10% HRA Project Assistant: Rs. 20000 + 10% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Rajiv Gandhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Rajiv Gandhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Rajiv Gandhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Rajiv Gandhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Staff positions at Rajiv Gandhi University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Staff positions at Rajiv Gandhi University is 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at Rajiv Gandhi University?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Project Staff positions at Rajiv Gandhi University, with one post each for Project Consultant, Project Associate, and Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Consultant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Consultant post, a Master Degree in Science/Engineering/Technology or equivalent is required. Significant working experience in science/technology development and project handling is also necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Associate and Project Assistant roles?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for both Project Associate and Project Assistant roles is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for these positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Project Staff positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant post offers a salary of Rs. 20000 plus 10% HRA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these recruitment posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these recruitment posts at Rajiv Gandhi University will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The Project Staff positions at Rajiv Gandhi University are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for Rajiv Gandhi University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application mode for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The application mode for these vacancies is via Email. Candidates need to send their application to the specified email address before the deadline.
